name: onset-sharpness
definition: How fast an event's envelope attacks - impulsive/transient (e.g. pothole, manhole strike) versus a gradual swell (e.g. rumble strip, sustained texture).
indicators: envelope attack time over a short window

detection.measure: normalised attack slope of the event's chaos/energy rise
detection.provenance: docs/tags/tag-architecture.md starter set; lib/squelch.js envelope analysis

confidence.basis: attack-slope sharpness; accel_cap=0.6 since an accelerometer disambiguates a true impulsive vertical impact from an audio-only sharp attack (e.g. a slammed door)

discrimination_test.claim: onset-sharpness separates impulsive strikes (manhole/pothole) from gradual texture swells

notes: Awaits the 82nd/39th Ave rough-road capture with labeled impulsive events; not yet reproduced on the Johnson Creek passes.
